testcase.name: test_admin_update_cms_section

failure.message:
AssertionError: Update should persist assert 'INTEGRATED LUXURY LIVING' == 'TEST_HEADING_7b014ecf'
- TEST_HEADING_7b014ecf + INTEGRATED LUXURY LIVING

testcase.failure: tests/test_cms_api.py:207: in test_admin_update_cms_section assert verify_data["heading_en"] == test_heading, "Update should persist" E AssertionError: Update should persist E assert 'INTEGRATED LUXURY LIVING' == 'TEST_HEADING_7b014ecf' E E - TEST_HEADING_7b014ecf E + INTEGRATED LUXURY LIVING

testcase.name: test_admin_update_without_auth

failure.message: AssertionError: Should reject unauthorized request assert 200 in [401, 403] + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_cms_api.py:223: in test_admin_update_without_auth assert response.status_code in [401, 403], "Should reject unauthorized request" E AssertionError: Should reject unauthorized request E assert 200 in [401, 403] E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code
